Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(**********************************************************************************

 Double functors between double categories of structured cospans

 Suppose that we have the following square of functors:

<<
          L₁
       A₁ ⟶ X₁
    FA |      | FX
       V      V
       A₂ ⟶ X₂
          L₂
>>

 and suppose that we have a natural transformation from `FA ∙ L₂` to `L₁ ∙ FX`. Then
 we have a double functor from the double category of `L₁`-structured cospans to
 the double category of `L₂`-structured cospans. The description on this double
 functor on the vertical categories is given by `FA`. A structured cospan
 `L₁ a <-- x --> L₁ b` is sent to `L₂ (FA a) <-- FX x --> L₂ (FA b)`.

 A part of this construction is already given in the file `StructuredCospans.v`.
 In that file the action of this double functor on objects, horizontal morphisms,
 and on squares is defined. In this file, we show that this gives rise to a double
 functor.

 A reference for this construction is Theorem 4.2 in "Structured Cospans" by Baez,
 and Courser.
    https://arxiv.org/pdf/1911.04630.pdf
 Another reference is Theorem 2.4 in "Structured and decorated cospans from the
 viewpoint of double category theory" by Patterson.
    https://arxiv.org/pdf/2304.00447.pdf
 Note that Baez and Courser look at strong double functors, whereas our notion of
 double functor is lax be default. If we assume that the natural transformation is
 an isomorphism and that the functor `FX` preserves pushouts, then this double
 functor is strong.

 Contents
 1. Preservation of horizontal identities
 2. Preservation of horizontal composition
 3. The coherences
 4. The double functors between the double categories of structured cospans
 5. Conditions under which this double functor is strong

 **********************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.DisplayedFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.Examples.StructuredCospans.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Pushouts.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Limits.Preservation.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfUnivCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Basics.DoubleCategoryBasics.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleFunctor.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.DoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Core.UnivalentDoubleCats.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.Examples.StructuredCospansDoubleCat.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope double_cat.

Section StructuredCospansDoubleFunctor.
  Context {A₁ A₂ X₁ X₂ : univalent_category}
          (PX₁ : Pushouts X₁)
          (PX₂ : Pushouts X₂)
          {L₁ : A₁ ⟶ X₁}
          {L₂ : A₂ ⟶ X₂}
          {FA : A₁ ⟶ A₂}
          {FX : X₁ ⟶ X₂}
          (α : FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX).

  (** * 1. Preservation of horizontal identities *)
  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_id_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_id_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x: A₁
double_id (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)
  (FA x) -->[ id₁ (FA x)
][ id₁ (FA x)] twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                 α x x
                 (double_id
                    (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
                       L₁) x)

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x: A₁
X₂
⟦ ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
    (double_id
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)
       (FA x)),
ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x x
     (double_id
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁) x))
⟧
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x: A₁
struct_cospan_laws L₂ (id₁ (FA x)) (id₁ (FA x))
  (double_id (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)
     (FA x))
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x x
     (double_id
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁) x))
  ?φ

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x: A₁
X₂
⟦ ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
    (double_id
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)
       (FA x)),
ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x x
     (double_id
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁) x))
⟧
 exact (α x).
    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x: A₁
struct_cospan_laws L₂ (id₁ (FA x)) (id₁ (FA x))
  (double_id (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)
     (FA x))
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x x
     (double_id
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁) x))
  (α x)
 abstract
        (split ; cbn ;
         rewrite !functor_id, !id_left, id_right ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁

FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_id_laws
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁

FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_id_laws
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: A₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
double_id_mor
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂) (# FA f) ;;2 
structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data y =
trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data x ;;2 
      (#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
             α))
        (double_id_mor
           (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁) f))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: A₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (double_id_mor
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)
     (# FA f) ;;2 structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data
                    y) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data
           x ;;2 (#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                        α))
                   (double_id_mor
                      (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
                         L₁) f)))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: A₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
# L₂ (# FA f) · α y = α x · # FX (# L₁ f)

    apply (nat_trans_ax α _ _ f).
  Qed.

  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)

double_functor_hor_id_data

  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₂)
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data.
    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂

FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_id_laws
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 2. Preservation of horizontal composition *)
  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_comp_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_comp_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
double_hor_comp
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x y h)
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α y z k) -->[
id₁ (FA x)
][ id₁ (FA z)] twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                 α x z
                 (double_hor_comp
                    (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                       PX₁ L₁) h k)

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
X₂
⟦ ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
    (double_hor_comp
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
       (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
          x y h)
       (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
          y z k)),
ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x z
     (double_hor_comp
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₁ L₁)
        h k)) ⟧
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
struct_cospan_laws L₂ (id₁ (FA x)) (id₁ (FA z))
  (double_hor_comp
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x
        y h)
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α y
        z k))
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x z
     (double_hor_comp
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₁ L₁)
        h k)) ?φ

h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
X₂
⟦ ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
    (double_hor_comp
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
       (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
          x y h)
       (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
          y z k)),
ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x z
     (double_hor_comp
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₁ L₁)
        h k)) ⟧

PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
X₂ ⟦ FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h),
FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k) ⟧
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁

FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
X₂ ⟦ FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k),
FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k) ⟧
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h) · ?Goal =
α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k) · ?Goal0

      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
X₂ ⟦ FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h),
FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k) ⟧
 exact (#FX (PushoutIn1 _)).
      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
X₂ ⟦ FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k),
FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k) ⟧
 exact (#FX (PushoutIn2 _)).
      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
· # FX
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)) =
α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
· # FX
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
 abstract
          (rewrite !assoc' ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
           apply maponpaths ;
           apply PushoutSqrCommutes).
    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y, z: A₁
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
k: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
struct_cospan_laws L₂ (id₁ (FA x)) (id₁ (FA z))
  (double_hor_comp
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x
        y h)
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α y
        z k))
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x z
     (double_hor_comp
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₁ L₁)
        h k))
  (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
           x y h)
        (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
           y z k))
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
        (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
           x z
           (double_hor_comp
              (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                 PX₁ L₁) h k)))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn1
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
      :
      X₂
      ⟦ ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
          (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
             α x y h),
      ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
        (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
           x z
           (double_hor_comp
              (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                 PX₁ L₁) h k)) ⟧)
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
      :
      X₂
      ⟦ ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
          (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
             α y z k),
      ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
        (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
           x z
           (double_hor_comp
              (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                 PX₁ L₁) h k)) ⟧)
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
        x y z h k
      :
      mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₂
        (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
           x y h)
      · (# FX
           (PushoutIn1
              (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
         :
         X₂
         ⟦ ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
             (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                α x y h),
         ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
           (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
              α x z
              (double_hor_comp
                 (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                    PX₁ L₁) h k)) ⟧) =
      mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₂
        (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α
           y z k)
      · (# FX
           (PushoutIn2
              (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
         :
         X₂
         ⟦ ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
             (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                α y z k),
         ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
           (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
              α x z
              (double_hor_comp
                 (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                    PX₁ L₁) h k)) ⟧)))
 abstract
        (split ;
         [ cbn ;
           rewrite !assoc' ;
           rewrite functor_id, id_left ;
           rewrite PushoutArrow_PushoutIn1 ;
           rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
           apply idpath
         | cbn ;
           rewrite !assoc' ;
           rewrite functor_id, id_left ;
           rewrite PushoutArrow_PushoutIn2 ;
           rewrite <- !functor_comp ;
           apply idpath ]).
  Defined.

PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_comp_laws
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data

A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
double_hor_comp_mor
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
  ((#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α))
     s₁)
  ((#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α))
     s₂) ;;2 structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
               x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂ =
trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
        x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ ;;2 (#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                                  α))
                             (double_hor_comp_mor
                                (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                   PX₁ L₁) s₁ s₂))

PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂

L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (double_hor_comp_mor
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
     ((#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
             α)) s₁)
     ((#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
             α)) s₂) ;;2 structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
                           x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (trb₂ (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
           x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁ ;;2 (#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                                     α))
                                (double_hor_comp_mor
                                   (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                      PX₁ L₁) s₁ s₂)))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
  (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
  (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
    (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
PushoutArrow
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₁)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₁))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)))
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
     x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)
· # FX (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₁ PX₁ s₁ s₂)

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₁ z₁

s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
       (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₁)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₁))
     (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn1
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
        x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)
   · # FX (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₁ PX₁ s₁ s₂))

  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))

· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)

  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· (PushoutArrow

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₁))

     (# FX

     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
        x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)
   · # FX (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₁ PX₁ s₁ s₂))

  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))

     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂

       (# FX

             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₁)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₁))
     (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn1
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
        x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)
   · # FX (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₁ PX₁ s₁ s₂))
 
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₁)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₁))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
     (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂)))
     (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂)
      · PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂)))
     (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
       (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₁)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₁))
     (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn1
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
        x₁ y₁ z₁ h₁ k₁)
   · # FX
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)
          (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₁
           · PushoutIn1
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂
                  k₂))
          (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂
           · PushoutIn2
               (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂
                  k₂))
          (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₁
             PX₁ s₁ s₂)))

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂

s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₁)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₁))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
     · PushoutIn1

            (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂)))
    (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂)
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂)))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
    (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· PushoutArrow

          s₁ s₂))

PX₂: Pushouts X₂

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂

s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
· PushoutIn1
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
    (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
# FX
  (PushoutIn1
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁))
· # FX
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)

        · PushoutIn1

       (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂
        · PushoutIn2

          s₁ s₂))

s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
# FX (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₁)
· # FX
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)) =
# FX
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₁
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))

   · PushoutIn1

     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₁)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
       (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))

     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))
     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))
· (PushoutArrow

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₁))

        (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)

       (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))

          (PushoutIn1

       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))

  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y₁)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h₁))

     (α y₁ · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k₁)))

struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (functor_on_struct_cospan_sqr α s₂)
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
    (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
# FX
  (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁))
· # FX

       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₁ k₁)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)

        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
       (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂
        · PushoutIn2
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₁ PX₁
          s₁ s₂))

       (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₁ PX₁
          s₁ s₂))

      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
# FX (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂)
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
    (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂) =
# FX
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))

      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
# FX (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂)
· (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h₂)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k₂))
       (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          x₂ y₂ z₂ h₂ k₂)) =
# FX
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))

      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
# FX (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂)
· # FX
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)) =
# FX
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))

      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: A₁
v₁: A₁ ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: A₁ ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₃: A₁ ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
h₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₁ y₁
h₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x₂ y₂
k₁: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₁ z₁
k₂: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y₂ z₂
s₁: h₁ -->[ v₁ ][ v₂] h₂
s₂: k₁ -->[ v₂ ][ v₃] k₂
# FX
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂)) =
# FX
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₁ s₂
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h₂ k₂))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category

L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁

FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_comp
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)

FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_hor_comp
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)

  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α)

PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁

double_functor_hor_comp_data
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data.

double_functor_hor_comp_laws
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 3. The coherences *)
  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_lunitor
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor PX₂ L₂)
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_lunitor
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor PX₂ L₂)
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
double_lunitor
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor PX₂ L₂)
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x y f) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
        (functor_double_id_cell
           structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id x)
        (id_two_disp
           (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
              α x y f)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                              structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
                              (double_id
                                 (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
                                    L₁) x) f ;;2 (#2 
                                                 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                                                 α))
                                                 (double_lunitor
                                                 (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor
                                                 PX₁
                                                 L₁) f))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (double_lunitor
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor PX₂ L₂)
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x
        y f)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor
           (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂
              L₂)
           (functor_double_id_cell
              structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id
              x)
           (id_two_disp
              (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                 α x y f)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                 structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
                                 (double_id
                                    (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
                                       L₁) x) f ;;2 
         (#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                α))
           (double_lunitor
              (structured_cospans_double_cat_lunitor
                 PX₁ L₁) f)))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L₂ PX₂
  (functor_on_struct_cospan α f) =
mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data x)
  (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x x y (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
· # FX (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor L₁ PX₁ f)

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
PushoutArrow
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA x))
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
  (ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
  (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
  (id₁
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
  (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)) =
PushoutArrow
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA x))
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α
        (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data x)
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
  (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data x)
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x x y (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
· # FX
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
       (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
       (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
       (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L₁ f))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (L₂ (FA x))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)) (id₁ (L₂ (FA x)))
     (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA x))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
    (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
    (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
    (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (L₂ (FA x))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)) (id₁ (L₂ (FA x)))
     (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA x))
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α
           (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
     (α x
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
      · PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
     (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data
           x)
        (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α x
            · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α y
            · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          x x y (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
   · # FX
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
          (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
          (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L₁ f)))

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))

             (functor_on_struct_cospan α
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))

                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))

        (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data
           x)
        (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α x
            · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α y
            · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))))
   · PushoutArrow

                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2

                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          x x y (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
   · # FX

             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))

       x x y (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
· # FX
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)

                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
      · PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
     (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data
           x)
        (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α x
            · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α y
            · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          x x y (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
   · # FX
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
          (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
          (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L₁ f)))
 
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (L₂ (FA x))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)) (id₁ (L₂ (FA x)))
     (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA x))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
    (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
    (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
    (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
    (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (L₂ (FA x))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)) (id₁ (L₂ (FA x)))
     (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA x))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
    (α x
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α
               (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
    (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α
               (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data
          x)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x x y (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
· # FX
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
       (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
       (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
       (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L₁ f))

· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂

· (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α
           (id_struct_cospan L₁ x))

                 (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)))

           x x y (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
      · # FX
          (PushoutArrow
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ x) f)
             (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
             (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
             (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
             (struct_cospan_lunitor_mor_subproof L₁ f))))

id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)) =
id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_runitor
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor PX₂ L₂)
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_runitor
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor PX₂ L₂)
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
double_runitor
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor PX₂ L₂)
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x y f) =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
        (id_two_disp
           (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
              α x y f))
        (functor_double_id_cell
           structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id y) ;;2 
      functor_double_comp_cell
        structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp f
        (double_id
           (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id L₁) y) ;;2 
      (#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
             α))
        (double_runitor
           (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor PX₁
              L₁) f))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (double_runitor
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor PX₂ L₂)
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x
        y f)) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor
           (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂
              L₂)
           (id_two_disp
              (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                 α x y f))
           (functor_double_id_cell
              structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id
              y) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                       structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
                       f
                       (double_id
                          (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_id
                             L₁) y) ;;2 (#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                                               α))
                                          (double_runitor
                                             (structured_cospans_double_cat_runitor
                                                PX₁ L₁)
                                             f)))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
struct_cospan_runitor_mor L₂ PX₂
  (functor_on_struct_cospan α f) =
mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
  (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data y)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x y y f (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
· # FX (struct_cospan_runitor_mor L₁ PX₁ f)

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
PushoutArrow
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
     (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA y)))
  (ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
  (id₁
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)))
  (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f))
  (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)) =
PushoutArrow
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
     (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA y)))
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α
        (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data y)
   · PushoutIn2

          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
  (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data y))

       (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L₁ f))

          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
          (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
          (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L₁ f)))

      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)) =
id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
· (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
           (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
   · # FX
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
          (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
          (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L₁ f)))

α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)) =
id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
· # FX
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
     · PushoutArrow
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
            (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
         (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)

FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)) =
id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))

      apply idpath.
    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (L₂ (FA y))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (id₁ (L₂ (FA y))))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA y)))
    (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
    (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
    (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
    (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (L₂ (FA y))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (id₁ (L₂ (FA y))))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA y)))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α
           (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
     (α y
      · PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
     (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α x
            · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α y
            · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data
           y))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          x y y f (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
   · # FX
       (PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
          (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
          (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
          (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L₁ f)))
 
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (L₂ (FA y))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (id₁ (L₂ (FA y))))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA y)))
    (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
    (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
    (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
    (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (L₂ (FA y))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (id₁ (L₂ (FA y))))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (id_struct_cospan L₂ (FA y)))
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
    (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     · PushoutIn1
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α
               (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
    (α y
     · PushoutIn2
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
            (functor_on_struct_cospan α
               (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
    (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_id_data
          y))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x y y f (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
· # FX
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
       (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
       (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
       (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L₁ f))

FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f) =
α y
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x y y f (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
· # FX
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
       (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
       (id₁ (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
       (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)
       (struct_cospan_runitor_mor_subproof L₁ f))

· (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α
           (id_struct_cospan L₁ y)))
   · (PushoutArrow

      · # FX
          (PushoutArrow
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f

FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f) =
α y
· # FX
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (id_struct_cospan L₁ y))
     · PushoutArrow
         (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f

         (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)

α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
x, y: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f) =
α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_associator
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator PX₂ L₂)
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
double_functor_associator
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator PX₂ L₂)
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
double_associator
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator PX₂ L₂)
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α w x f)
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x y g)
  (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α y z h) ;;2 
double_hor_comp_mor
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
  (functor_double_comp_cell
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp f g)
  (id_two_disp
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α y
        z h)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                    structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
                    (double_hor_comp
                       (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                          PX₁ L₁) f g) h =
trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂ L₂)
        (id_two_disp
           (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
              α w x f))
        (functor_double_comp_cell
           structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
           g h) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                      structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
                      f
                      (double_hor_comp
                         (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                            PX₁ L₁) g h) ;;2 (#2 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                                                 α))
                                               (double_associator
                                                 (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator
                                                 PX₁
                                                 L₁) f
                                                 g h))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (double_associator
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator PX₂ L₂)
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α w
        x f)
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α x
        y g)
     (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor α y
        z h) ;;2 double_hor_comp_mor
                   (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                      PX₂ L₂)
                   (functor_double_comp_cell
                      structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
                      f g)
                   (id_two_disp
                      (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                         α y z h)) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                                         structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
                                         (double_hor_comp
                                            (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                                               PX₁ L₁)
                                            f g) h) =
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (trf₂ (double_hor_comp_mor
           (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp PX₂
              L₂)
           (id_two_disp
              (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                 α w x f))
           (functor_double_comp_cell
              structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
              g h) ;;2 functor_double_comp_cell
                         structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
                         f
                         (double_hor_comp
                            (structured_cospans_double_cat_hor_comp
                               PX₁ L₁) g h) ;;2 (#2 
                                                 (twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans_functor
                                                 α))
                                                 (double_associator
                                                 (structured_cospans_double_cat_associator
                                                 PX₁
                                                 L₁) f
                                                 g h)))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
struct_cospan_associator_mor L₂ PX₂
  (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
  (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
  (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data w
       x y f g)
    (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
     Core.id_disp
       (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
     Core.id_disp
       (α z · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h) =
mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
  (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α w · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α x · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
  (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data x y
     z g h)
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
· # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h)

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
