FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (α x · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ g)
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))))
· (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (α x · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ g)
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α w · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α x · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
        x y z g h)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
   · # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h))

  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))

· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂

          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
   · # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h))

             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))))

     (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp

           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))))
· PushoutArrow

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h) =

   · PushoutArrow

          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))

             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))

           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))

   · (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
           w x y f g)
        (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α y
            · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
         Core.id_disp
           (α z
            · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
      · PushoutArrow
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
          (FX
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
          (# FX
             (PushoutIn1
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                   (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
          (# FX
             (PushoutIn2
                (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                   (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
          (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
             w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))) =
?b
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
?b =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (α x · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (α x · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ g)
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α w · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α x · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
        x y z g h)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
   · # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h))

          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α

       (FX

       (# FX

                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
   · # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h))

# FX
  (PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f g))
· PushoutIn1
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))

      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))))
· (mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
     (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α w · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α x · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
        x y z g h)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
   · # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h))

      Core.id_disp

g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y

  (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α w · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f

· # FX

          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

· # FX
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α w · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α x · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
· (PushoutIn1
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α
           (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
   · (PushoutArrow
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α
              (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
        (FX
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
              (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
        (# FX
           (PushoutIn1
              (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                 (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
        (# FX
           (PushoutIn2
              (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                 (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
        (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
           w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
      · # FX
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h))) =
?b

  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA x)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ f))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)

        (α w · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)),,
      Core.id_disp
        (α x · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ f)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
        x y z g h)
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (FX

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (# FX

       (# FX

                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))) =

     z g h)
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof

     (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))

     (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
  (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
  (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
  (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data w
       x y f g)
    (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
     Core.id_disp
       (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,

    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof

h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn1
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h)))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
        x y z g h)
   · PushoutIn2

          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))) = 
?y'

     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))

        (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))

              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data

       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp

        Core.id_disp

L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
PushoutIn2
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α
        (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
· # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h) =
?t2

PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂

FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
PushoutIn2
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α
        (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)) = 
?y'

          apply PushoutArrow_PushoutIn2.
        
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
# FX
  (PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h))
· (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
           (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
   · # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h)) =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁

FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
# FX
  (PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h))
· (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
           (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
   · # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h)) =

A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
?b =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁

              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h) = 
?b

    (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
     Core.id_disp
       (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
     Core.id_disp
       (α z · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h) = 
?t2

· mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂

       x y f g)

          apply PushoutArrow_PushoutIn1.

          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)) =
?b

          
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
PushoutIn1
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α
        (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h) = 
?t2

          apply PushoutArrow_PushoutIn1.
        
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
# FX
  (PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f g))
· # FX
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)) =
# FX
  (PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f g)
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

        exact (!(functor_comp _ _ _)).

  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))

       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof

   · # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h)) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))

              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data

α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn1
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h)))
     (# FX
        (PushoutIn2
           (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h)))
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
        x y z g h)
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))) =
?y'

  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))

     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))

          apply PushoutArrow_PushoutIn2.
        
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
# FX
  (PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h))
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
· # FX (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h) =
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

        (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof

      · # FX

PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutArrow

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
      · PushoutIn1

                (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))

     (PushoutIn2

              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data

          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,

             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX

      · # FX

PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁

FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁

g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
?b =
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)

     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂

           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)

     (PushoutIn2

           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂

                (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)

           (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

           w x z f (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ g h))
      · # FX
          (struct_cospan_associator_mor L₁ PX₁ f g h))) =

PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁

  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))

           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)

              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow

                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))

?b =
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))

     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))

        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))

        (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α

          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))

          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2

                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))

              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

        
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
# FX
  (PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h))
· # FX
    (PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h)
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ f g)
        · PushoutIn1
            (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
               (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₁ PX₁ f
          g h)) = ?b
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
?b =
PushoutIn2
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ g))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutArrow
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
      · PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
             (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
                (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
             (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h)
· PushoutArrow (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ g h)
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
       (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)

          apply PushoutArrow_PushoutIn2.

        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
      · PushoutIn1

           (comp_struct_cospan L₂ PX₂
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
              (functor_on_struct_cospan α g))
           (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)))
     (struct_cospan_associator_mor_subproof L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α f)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α g)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · mor_of_comp_struct_cospan_mor L₂ PX₂
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data
          w x y f g)
       (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
        Core.id_disp
          (α z
           · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))))
· PushoutArrow

          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁

    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2

             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h) = 
?b

L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α z · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h) =
# FX
  (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
        (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

        
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (id₁ (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)),,
   Core.id_disp
     (α z · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)))
· (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α
           (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
   · PushoutArrow
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
       (FX
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn1
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (# FX
          (PushoutIn2
             (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
                (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
       (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
          w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)) =
# FX
  (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
        (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

        
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
w, x, y, z: A₁
f: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ w x
g: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ x y
h: twosided_disp_cat_of_struct_cospans L₁ y z
PushoutIn2
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α
        (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g))
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h))
    (FX
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
          (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
             (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       w y z (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h) =
# FX
  (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁
        (comp_struct_cospan L₁ PX₁ f g) h))

        apply PushoutArrow_PushoutIn2.
  Qed.

  (** * 4. The double functors between the double categories of structured cospans *)
  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
lax_double_functor
  (structured_cospans_univalent_double_cat PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_univalent_double_cat PX₂ L₂)

PX₂: Pushouts X₂

lax_double_functor
  (structured_cospans_univalent_double_cat PX₁ L₁)
  (structured_cospans_univalent_double_cat PX₂ L₂)

  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_associator.
  Defined.

  (** * 5. Conditions under which this double functor is strong *)
  Context (Hα : is_nat_z_iso α)
          (HFX : preserves_pushout FX).

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x: A₁
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor x))
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor x))
  (lax_double_functor_id_h
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor x)

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x: A₁
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor x))
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor x))
  (lax_double_functor_id_h
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor x)

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x: A₁
is_z_isomorphism
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
     (lax_double_functor_id_h
        structured_cospans_double_cat_functor x))

    apply Hα.
  Defined.

  Section PreservesComp.
    Context {x y z : structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁}
            (h : x -->h y)
            (k : y -->h z).

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
· # FX
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)) =
# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
· # FX
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
· # FX
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)) =
# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
· # FX
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))

      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
# FX
  (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h
   · PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)) =
# FX
  (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k
   · PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))

      
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h
· PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k) =
mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k
· PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)

      apply PushoutSqrCommutes.
    Qed.

    Let P : Pushout
              (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
              (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
      := make_Pushout
           _ _ _ _ _
           structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
           (HFX
              _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
              (isPushout_Pushout (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))).

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
P:= make_Pushout
  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutSqrCommutes
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
X₂ ⟦ FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k),
comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
  (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
  (functor_on_struct_cospan α k) ⟧

PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁

FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
P:= make_Pushout
  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))

        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutSqrCommutes
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
X₂ ⟦ FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k),
comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
  (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
  (functor_on_struct_cospan α k) ⟧

h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z

  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))

A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
P:= make_Pushout
  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutSqrCommutes
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
· PushoutIn1
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)) =
# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
· PushoutIn2
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))
 abstract
          (use (cancel_z_iso' (make_z_iso _ _ (Hα y))) ;
           rewrite !assoc ;
           apply PushoutSqrCommutes).
    Defined.

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
P:= make_Pushout
  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutSqrCommutes
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
is_inverse_in_precat
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
     (lax_double_functor_comp_h
        structured_cospans_double_cat_functor h k))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv

  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)

is_inverse_in_precat
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂

A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
P:= make_Pushout
  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutSqrCommutes
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor h k)
· PushoutArrow P
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
    structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_subproof =
id₁
  (ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
     (#h structured_cospans_double_cat_functor h
      ·h #h structured_cospans_double_cat_functor k))
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
P:= make_Pushout
  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutSqrCommutes
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
PushoutArrow P
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))
  (PushoutIn1
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
  (PushoutIn2
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
        (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_subproof
· struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
    (lax_double_functor_comp_h
       structured_cospans_double_cat_functor h k) =
id₁
  (ob_of_struct_cospan L₂
     (#h structured_cospans_double_cat_functor
      (h ·h k)))

       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
    structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_subproof =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)))
· id₁
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))

FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
P:= make_Pushout
  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutSqrCommutes
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
# FX
  (PushoutIn1 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
· PushoutArrow P
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
    structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_subproof =
PushoutIn1
  (PX₂ (L₂ (FA y)) (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (FX (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
     (α y · # FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
     (α y · # FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)))

          apply (PushoutArrow_PushoutIn1 P).

        x y z h k)

       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂

    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))
    (PushoutIn1
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
    (PushoutIn2
       (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
          (functor_on_struct_cospan α k)))
    structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_subproof
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))
    (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x y z h k) =
# FX
  (PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
· id₁ (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))

PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
P:= make_Pushout
  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutSqrCommutes
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
PushoutIn2
  (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
     (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))
· PushoutArrow
    (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₂ PX₂
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α h)
       (functor_on_struct_cospan α k))
    (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn1
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
    (# FX
       (PushoutIn2
          (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
    (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_data_subproof
       x y z h k) =
# FX
  (PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
· id₁ (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))

# FX
  (PushoutIn2 (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))

          apply idpath.
    Qed.

    
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂
FA: A₁ ⟶ A₂
FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
x, y, z: structured_cospans_double_cat PX₁ L₁
h: x -->h y
k: y -->h z
P:= make_Pushout
  (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
  (FX (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  (# FX
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
  (HFX (L₁ y) (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (ob_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k)
     (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h)
     (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k)
     (PushoutIn1
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutIn2
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     (PushoutSqrCommutes
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
is_iso_twosided_disp
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor x))
  (identity_is_z_iso
     (structured_cospans_double_cat_functor z))
  (lax_double_functor_comp_h
     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor h k)

     structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_eq
     (isPushout_Pushout
        (comp_struct_cospan_Pushout L₁ PX₁ h k))): Pushout (# FX (mor_right_of_struct_cospan L₁ h))
  (# FX (mor_left_of_struct_cospan L₁ k))
is_inverse_in_precat
  (struct_cospan_sqr_ob_mor L₂
     (lax_double_functor_comp_h
        structured_cospans_double_cat_functor h k))
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv
 exact structured_cospans_double_cat_functor_comp_iso_inv_laws.
    Defined.
  End PreservesComp.

  
A₁, A₂, X₁, X₂: univalent_category
PX₁: Pushouts X₁
PX₂: Pushouts X₂
L₁: A₁ ⟶ X₁
L₂: A₂ ⟶ X₂

FX: X₁ ⟶ X₂
α: FA ∙ L₂ ⟹ L₁ ∙ FX
Hα: is_nat_z_iso α
HFX: preserves_pushout FX
is_strong_double_functor
  structured_cospans_double_cat_functor
